message:
fix(git): prevent double-wrapping of code blocks in markdown render

Fix render_skill_markdown() to detect when code block content already
contains markdown fence markers (```).

Previously, code blocks were unconditionally wrapped with ```, leading
to malformed output like:
  \`\`\`
  \`\`\`python
  print("hello")
  \`\`\`
  \`\`\`

Now the renderer checks if content starts with ``` and skips adding
redundant fences, producing clean markdown output.

Also trims trailing whitespace from code block content for cleaner
formatting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
